CustomField.description: Marker for B12 (Phase B insurance seed) records. TRUE means this InsurancePolicy was generated by FscInsuranceSeed to satisfy the §6.1 D2 commitment (Insurance UI not empty for demos). Idempotency gate.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-managed by FscInsuranceSeed. TRUE means this is generated demo data; do not edit.
CustomField.label: Is Seeded Insurance
